## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss challenges with a client's content expectations and strategize improvements to the content creation workflow.](https://fathom.video/share/sAjD_-DgiwMdSgHSu5MNao1sK5wAysRH?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Client (UX company) dissatisfied with current content output; misalignment between expectations and deliverables](https://fathom.video/share/sAjD_-DgiwMdSgHSu5MNao1sK5wAysRH?tab=summary&timestamp=19.0)
  - [Team considering shift to more programmatic, factual content (e.g., UX expert profiles) to address quality concerns](https://fathom.video/share/sAjD_-DgiwMdSgHSu5MNao1sK5wAysRH?tab=summary&timestamp=441.0)
  - [Need to balance SEO requirements with content specificity and accuracy](https://fathom.video/share/sAjD_-DgiwMdSgHSu5MNao1sK5wAysRH?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Potential to leverage post-processing steps and calibration articles to improve output formatting and style](https://fathom.video/share/sAjD_-DgiwMdSgHSu5MNao1sK5wAysRH?tab=summary&timestamp=709.0)

## Topics

### Client Feedback and Content Quality Issues

  - [Client unhappy with specific use cases and accuracy of content](https://fathom.video/share/sAjD_-DgiwMdSgHSu5MNao1sK5wAysRH?tab=summary&timestamp=103.0)
  - [Team struggling to match client's expectations despite using multiple LLMs and human input](https://fathom.video/share/sAjD_-DgiwMdSgHSu5MNao1sK5wAysRH?tab=summary&timestamp=81.0)
  - [Concerns about word count and SEO opportunities conflicting with suggestions to simplify content](https://fathom.video/share/sAjD_-DgiwMdSgHSu5MNao1sK5wAysRH?tab=summary&timestamp=500.0)

### Proposed Solution: Programmatic Content Approach

  - [Shift focus to creating factual, resource-based content (e.g., UX researcher profiles, book summaries)](https://fathom.video/share/sAjD_-DgiwMdSgHSu5MNao1sK5wAysRH?tab=summary&timestamp=441.0)
  - [Example given: clay.com's approach to creating simple, factual pages](https://fathom.video/share/sAjD_-DgiwMdSgHSu5MNao1sK5wAysRH?tab=summary&timestamp=284.0)
  - [Potential to create a UX resource library with TLDR summaries and takeaways](https://fathom.video/share/sAjD_-DgiwMdSgHSu5MNao1sK5wAysRH?tab=summary&timestamp=441.0)
  - [Client initially resistant to scaling back content, preferring longer articles for SEO](https://fathom.video/share/sAjD_-DgiwMdSgHSu5MNao1sK5wAysRH?tab=summary&timestamp=500.0)

### SEO Strategy Considerations

  - [Kyle warned about potential risks with broad-based content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/sAjD_-DgiwMdSgHSu5MNao1sK5wAysRH?tab=summary&timestamp=327.0)
  - [Google algorithm changes targeting sites building domain authority for competitive keywords](https://fathom.video/share/sAjD_-DgiwMdSgHSu5MNao1sK5wAysRH?tab=summary&timestamp=338.0)
  - [Importance of relevance and specificity in content to avoid traffic loss](https://fathom.video/share/sAjD_-DgiwMdSgHSu5MNao1sK5wAysRH?tab=summary&timestamp=369.0)

### Workflow and System Improvements

  - [Team acknowledges need for calibration and system enhancements](https://fathom.video/share/sAjD_-DgiwMdSgHSu5MNao1sK5wAysRH?tab=summary&timestamp=587.0)
  - [Considering use of ChatGPT or other tools to improve output quality in short term](https://fathom.video/share/sAjD_-DgiwMdSgHSu5MNao1sK5wAysRH?tab=summary&timestamp=560.0)
  - [Plans to leverage post-processing steps to refine formatting and style based on client preferences](https://fathom.video/share/sAjD_-DgiwMdSgHSu5MNao1sK5wAysRH?tab=summary&timestamp=709.0)

### Calibration and Example-Based Approach

  - [Proposal to create a high-quality calibration article as a benchmark](https://fathom.video/share/sAjD_-DgiwMdSgHSu5MNao1sK5wAysRH?tab=summary&timestamp=530.0)
  - [Use of examples to show potential improvements over current client content](https://fathom.video/share/sAjD_-DgiwMdSgHSu5MNao1sK5wAysRH?tab=summary&timestamp=554.0)
  - [Focus on style, tone, and formatting in calibration process](https://fathom.video/share/sAjD_-DgiwMdSgHSu5MNao1sK5wAysRH?tab=summary&timestamp=709.0)

### Brief Adjustments

  - [Removal of emphasis on accuracy in the content brief](https://fathom.video/share/sAjD_-DgiwMdSgHSu5MNao1sK5wAysRH?tab=summary&timestamp=103.0)
  - [Incorporation of client feedback into company brief](https://fathom.video/share/sAjD_-DgiwMdSgHSu5MNao1sK5wAysRH?tab=summary&timestamp=895.0)
  - [Need for further refinement of brief to align with client expectations](https://fathom.video/share/sAjD_-DgiwMdSgHSu5MNao1sK5wAysRH?tab=summary&timestamp=922.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Jenn and Deya to discuss and plan approach for creating a standout calibration article](https://fathom.video/share/sAjD_-DgiwMdSgHSu5MNao1sK5wAysRH?tab=summary&timestamp=847.0)
  - [Marcel to send link to clay.com profile example for reference](https://fathom.video/share/sAjD_-DgiwMdSgHSu5MNao1sK5wAysRH?tab=summary&timestamp=987.0)
  - [Team to review and adjust content brief, removing accuracy focus and incorporating client feedback](https://fathom.video/share/sAjD_-DgiwMdSgHSu5MNao1sK5wAysRH?tab=summary&timestamp=895.0)
  - [Explore post-processing techniques to improve content formatting and style](https://fathom.video/share/sAjD_-DgiwMdSgHSu5MNao1sK5wAysRH?tab=summary&timestamp=709.0)
  - [Consider creating a template for UX expert profiles as part of new content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/sAjD_-DgiwMdSgHSu5MNao1sK5wAysRH?tab=summary&timestamp=530.0)
  - [Schedule follow-up discussion to finalize approach and next actions](https://fathom.video/share/sAjD_-DgiwMdSgHSu5MNao1sK5wAysRH?tab=summary&timestamp=1001.0)
